ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., dataset access, method application) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset involved in the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each log entry
Type of event (e.g., dataset access, method application)
ID of the dataset involved in the event
ID of the user who triggered the event
Unique identifier for each data quality metric
Name of the data quality metric
Value of the data quality metric
